description: mailinator is very revolutionary application and it is very fast in reciveing the verification codes, password reset emails, we are using this in salesforce cloud accounts creations, mailinator helped us to stop creating emails manually.
author: Arun Kumar T.
pros: Mailinator is very good application to recieve email verification codes for multiple users we use, this is the best app.
cons: everything is excellent in mailinator nothing is bad in the mailinator we did not see any cons in the mailinator

review_title: Just 5 minutes to start email testing
description: Mailinator is a good tool for testing email flows in our automated QA setup, it is easy to integrate and use.
author: Oksana R.
pros: Customer Support was great. It was easy to start with emails testing. And I like the statistics with the used data.
cons: The interface is a bit simple, but not a problem for me. And from the documentation view, you don't have a direct button to your dashboard.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We were testing an integration with an AI chatbot and needed to have testing candidates apply for fake positions, each test required and email address.
author: James B.
pros: It is nice to be able to test communications as a company without having to create email addresses.
cons: Sometimes we needed the mailbox to last longer than it did.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reliable and Efficient Tool for Email Testing
description: Overall, my experience has been very positive. Mailinator significantly simplifies email verification testing for web and mobile applications. The learning curve is minimal, making it accessible for both testers and developers. From a QA perspective, it supports smooth test execution, especially when validating registration flows, OTP emails, password reset flows, and notification systems. The platform is secure, reliable, and integrates well into automated and manual testing strategies. Customer support has been professional and supportive, which adds confidence in using the tool long term.
author: Dharmendra K.
pros: Mailinator is extremely convenient for email testing workflows. The ability to quickly create and access test inboxes without complex setup saves significant time during QA cycles. The Verified Pro account provides added control and reliability, especially for application-level email validation. The platform is stable, fast, and easy to integrate into testing processes. Customer support is responsive and professional. My recent interaction was handled promptly and clearly explained, which reflects strong service quality.
cons: The usage limits can be easy to exceed during high-volume automated testing if multiple team members are using the same account. Clearer real-time usage visibility or alerts before reaching limits would be helpful to prevent unexpected account restrictions.

review_title: Mailinator: the best temporary mail box for everybody
description: Overall, mailinator is amazing and gets the work done fast.
author: Manish S.
pros: The flexibility, how easily I can get test my application’s email functionality with mailinator. Also I can choose any username I want.
cons: Sometimes I am not able to see the attachments in the email is something I don’t particularly like.

author: Venkat M.
pros: I found Mailinator to be exceptionally user-friendly, making it very easy and intuitive to interact with. The interface is clean and straightforward, allowing for quick navigation and instant access to incoming emails. This simplicity significantly speeds up the testing process, as there's no complex setup or lengthy learning curve involved. It truly streamlines the workflow for email verification.
cons: What I liked least about Mailinator is the inability to change the admin email address associated with the account. This is a significant limitation for account management and can pose challenges for security and administrative flexibility, especially as team members or contact information changes over time

description: We love using the Golang library and integrating Mailinator with our test automation runs. SMS is also very cool!
author: Khaled M.
pros: Simple and ease of use. Using the API (golang library), we can automate many flows using email/sms. Highly recommended
cons: Searching mailbox not always easy. Finishing the right body or mailbox is something tricky. Otherwise it’s all good

description: I think Mailinator is a great product and I would recommend it to every co-worker or customer who needs the abilities the software contains. I use it almost every day.
author: Kevin H.
pros: I love the ability to create test emails on the fly, which allows us to test processes quicker compared to having to create "real" emails.
cons: I do not like how quickly messages are removed from an inbox and I also do not like that the email formatting isn't displayed properly.

review_title: Excellent tool for running QA testing using many email addresses
description: Very intuitive tool for QA testing that's made the process of testing with multiple emails easy. We love it and I recommend it to others who need this type of functionality running routine testing.
author: Ellen W.
pros: Extremely easy to set up and utilize so that you can run tests using many different emails. The one time we had a question we heard back quickly and the support was effective and very helpful.
cons: Nothing I can think of; it's been great. It was recommended to us by the company whose tool we are implementing and don't have any constructive feedback.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I had trouble getting my public box to populate, but customer service unblocked my domain within 24 hours.
author: Scott P.
pros: I appreciated the customer support when my domain was accidentally blocked. Within 24 hours, the domain was unblocked.
cons: Nothing. I did not encounter anything that I did not like so far. I had trouble but customer service gave me thorough and helpful support.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: If I could have a different token for different mailbox, I'd be very happy
author: Vladimir D.
pros: Simple to setup, especially with my own domain
cons: Pretty hard to navigate documentation. Also, I can't use / in email addresses if I want ot fetch email by API
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Does what it's designed to do well, and solves a real problem.
description: I use it regularly in my testing and my team's testing of forms. We used to use random sites, but now we have a dedicated tool, and you can even have some semblance in branding because you can pick the part that comes before the @ symbol in the dashboard.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Solves a legit problem for my team as a leader of a dev team. No more going to random websites that offer temp emails for our testing. This is consistent and works great for our team to create test emails for testing new apps and website forms. I really like the "wildcard" nature of it, because you can literally create an email by entering anything before your dedicated @mailinator address. Once you have the dedicated @... address through mailinator, you can make an email like test-[product]@mailinator. and just have to remember the part that comes after the @. You can make an email address this way.
cons: The UI could be slightly better. It looks like developers designed it, but the function makes this "con" almost moot.

description: Very Good! I'm recommended this to my organization and most of them are using this. I feel its very helpful especially in my field of work.
author: Jayaroopini G.
pros: Its usability and real time sync of mails. I use it for software testing purpose, it helps me alot while other products ask number of questions and verification, mailinator perfectly serves its purpose!
cons: Honestly nothing I see as a con in Mailinator

review_title: Great product - highly reccomend for testing websites
description: Fantastic. I'm thrilled to have discovered Mailinator, will continue to use it, and reccomend it to my coworkers.
author: Rebekah P.
pros: It's easy to use and ALWAYS works. It's my go to for testing with emails (as a developer).
cons: It's minor, but not know reserved keywords like "admin".

review_title: The best E-mail testing service yet!
description: It has been very good, me and my team have gotten to do a lot of our testing very efficiently.
author: Onour S.
pros: Ease of use, very ergonomic. A bunch of documentation to learn from. Very useful for running automated tests.
cons: Occasionally not finding the right answers for some questions on the documentation but this is technically resolved through the community behind Mailinator

description: Simple the best. The best tool used in my tests.
author: Anderson R.
pros: easy to test as QA is fast and direct, making test easy and able to test multiple emails and users simultaneously.
cons: no option to see multiple inboxes at the same time

description: Easy to use and streamlines system testing.
author: Michelle S.
pros: I love that we have an option to conduct system testing with a working email to test full functionality and performance.
cons: Messages expire after 7 days - I wasn't aware of that when I started, so I had to redo some testing.

review_title: Efficient and Reliable Disposable Email Solution
author: Mohammed S.
pros: Mailinator is perfect for quick, disposable emails and I like most thing is no needed signup and great tools for testing and automation
cons: Mailinator's public inboxes lack privacy, and limited features in the free plan can be restrictive for some use cases, also some time inbox is not properly working.

author: theo G.
pros: I like the simplicity of the usage and meeting my requirements.
cons: I can't think of anything that is unsatisfactory.

review_title: Fast, Efficient and painless ... Target for others to strive for.
description: It is a struggle to find negatives about the efficiency of the services provided by Mailinator. Fast, Efficient, painless is how I would sum up utilizing Mailinator.
author: Rob M.
pros: Create as many private email addresses as you need. Throw away email addresses for testing without cluttering your inbox, or risking getting on spam lists.
cons: Service is popular enough that some sites are blocking all known Mailinator domains.

review_title: Easy to setup, flexible and use
description: nice interface, controls, and very intutitive
author: Rajeev K.
pros: easy to use email inbox as when needs to test create multiple accounts.
cons: Doesn't hold emails more than a day, sometimes we need to test past email.

author: Anton R.
pros: Open API, service works without any issues
cons: I haven’t noticed any issues. Use this service for my QA testing purposes

description: It is good. I mostly liked it's services.
author: Akshay C.
pros: I loved the thing that I can create as many emails as I can without worry. Also it gave free Pro account, that's a plus point for me. Now I'll be able to see old emails also
cons: I need similar feature for SMS as free public email. Also the monthly limit should be increased.

review_title: A Great Product to Have While Testing
author: Daniel W.
pros: I love the ease of use in regards to checking messaging from test phone numbers and emails.
cons: Some of the UI doesn't feel intuitive so the learning curve to using the product is a bit longer than other testing products.

review_title: Great, Free Tool for Testing Emails
author: Peter K.
pros: Easy to sign up and use (even the free version). Great for testing emails.
cons: In the free Pro version, while I had my own private inbox, after so many days it deleted emails, which meant for longer email journeys that I was testing I had to document things before Mailinator would remove the emails.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
